---
title: "About me"
sidebar: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/profile_with_lola.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielobembe/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/danielobembe
---

I'm Ayo, a quantitative finance practitioner with a focus on derivatives pricing, volatility modelling, and systematic trading strategies.

This blog is a working record of ideas I find worth writing down carefully. The posts are meant to be rigorous without being impenetrable — the kind of writing I wished existed when I was first learning these topics. Each post is part reference material, part worked example, and part thinking out loud.

The areas I return to most often are options theory, stochastic volatility, and the intersection of statistical inference with trading. Expect equations, code, and occasional digressions into market structure.
